name: Paul
message: Absolutely fantastic place to stay. Peaceful, great location, great price, and very responsive owner.

name: Jessalyn
message: One of the most comfortable Airbnbs I've stayed in. Had everything we needed.

name: Sondra
message: The condo is super nice, with new appliances! It was absolute paradise!

name: Alexandria
message: I brought my family with me and we all loved it. We talked about if we return to visit again we would all like to stay at this listing again.

name: Lacey
message: Great place to stay! The beach chairs, towels, coolers, umbrellas, and beach bag were very nice to have! Would definitely stay again.

name: Chayde
message: Everything was just like the photos. Really beautiful and clean.
